queue_item.action: Classify workflow-run observations so incomplete connector results cannot be mistaken for proof that CI did not run.
required_evidence: explicit absence-claim limit and falsification route

progress.finding: An empty first-page, event-filtered workflow-run response is an incomplete observation, not evidence that no workflow run exists for the commit.
progress.verification: Four deterministic Node tests passed: exact run observed, incomplete empty observation, complete bounded no-match, and malformed commit rejection.

queue_item.handoff: Use this classifier before interpreting any workflow-run query. For R-012, obtain an authenticated exact-head-sha all-page response and retain the raw pages before claiming bounded no-match or observed execution.

canonical_queue_update_policy: Append-only team-owned update; operations/ACTIVE_QUEUE.json was not overwritten.
next_action: Build or execute the complete authenticated all-page workflow-run enumerator for commit e35a5e264d6d4f0535d236c6f0b17f2813efa665, then validate any retained browser-evidence artifact against that exact run and commit.
